values.description: Root URL for the JSONPlaceholder public mock API. Change this to point at a different environment (e.g. a local mock server).
Default post ID used in GET /posts/:id, PUT /posts/:id, and DELETE /posts/:id requests.
Default user ID used in GET /users/:id and GET /posts?userId=:id requests.
Populated by the POST auto-ID test script. Holds the id returned by the server after a POST /posts call.
